method: Normal CDF centered on most recent published Truflation Eggs Index value (~$2.859/dozen, last 5 weekly samples 2.858-2.860). Sigma=0.025 widens to absorb 1-day publication lag, possible methodology resets, and the +$0.085 jump observed in the recent series.
notes: Settlement is the Truflation US CPI Eggs Index value attributed to 28-Apr-2026 (published next morning per Kalshi rules; 10:00 ET expiration). Current value extracted from time-series embedded in Truflation marketplace HTML (last 30 weekly points: ...2.855,2.855,2.856,2.856,2.859,2.859,2.860,2.860,2.858,2.859). Series is sampled weekly on the public chart; true daily value may differ slightly. Market mid quotes are erratic in 2.85-2.88 (almost flat ~0.49-0.50) then crater at 2.89 (0.085) — a likely thin-book artifact. Model probabilities are monotone non-increasing and represent an independent estimate. Confidence MEDIUM (good underlying value but uncertain about exact same-day vs lagged figure).
